title: Masterplast Breathable Cohesive Support Bandage 7Cm X 3.6M
features: SUPPORT SPRAINS & STRAINS: Masterplast Cohesive Support Bandage, gives the support of a crepe bandage with the added advantage of being flexible and self fastening. It can be removed and repositioned and is fully breathable

FLEXIBLE & BREATHABLE: Masterplast Cohesive Support Bandage is flexible, breathable making it comfortable to wear. Self securing bandage, pins and tape are not required. Painless to remove, the bandage does not stick to skin
SPORTS SUPPORT: Masterplast Cohesive Support Bandage, provides support to damaged muscles, tendons and ligaments. Add to sports/gym bag, add to travelling bag first aid kit
LATEX ALLERGY: Masterplast Cohesive Support Bandage, contains latex, do not use if you have an allergy to latex. Keep out of the reach of children. Do not apply too tightly
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Masterplast Cohesive Bandage, 7cm x3.6M approx. Material 97 PercentPolyester, 3 PercentElastance. Hand Wash Only. Colour: Blue
description: Masterplast Cohesive Support Bandage, gives the support of a crepe bandage with the added advantage of being flexible and self fastening. Provides support to damaged muscles, tendons and ligaments. Add to sports/gym bag, add to travelling bag first aid kit. The bandage can be removed and repositioned and is fully breathable. Self securing bandage, pins and tape are not required. Painless to remove, the bandage does not stick to skin. Masterplast Cohesive Support Bandage, contains latex, do not use if you have an allergy to latex. Keep out of the reach of children. Do not apply too tightly.
